title: Steal Like an Artist: 10 Things Nobody Told You About Being Creative
subtitle: An Illustrated Guide to Creativity
authorBiography: Austin Kleon is an artist, writer, and speaker. His work has been translated into over 40 languages and featured by major media outlets.
keyIdeas: Fake it till you make it
keyTakeaways: Copy others as practice before developing your own voice
Share what you love to build your audience
Keep a daily logbook or commonplace book
Travel and change your environment to spark creativity
excerpt: Nothing is original, so embrace influence, collect ideas, and remix them into your own creative voice.
